entry.title: Re: how to add custom fields from MARA(using CFL) in GUI transactions in T-Code MM01/02/03
entry.content:
Hi @Yogananda,

Is there any specific configuration to be added, so the field added via Custom fields app to Business Context PRODUCT is visible in apps with SAP Gui Context RFM_PRODUCT_GUI ? Is it needed to extend/create manually screen and function group SAPLMGD1 (as it was reuqired in ECC)?

thx for suggestions,

entry.title: Unit test is diffrence between Cloud and on-premise
entry.content:
Dear experts, when I was testing Unit test in the local version of the system, I found that after using the commit entities statement, the data was persistently stored in the DB, and the ROLLBACK ENTITIES statement did not take effect. May I ask if this is a BUG? The following is my test code. The problem occurs in the 'check_input_is_validate' method:

"!@testing BDEF:ZI_UT_ROOT
CLASS ltc_ZI_UT_ROOT
DEFINITION FINAL FOR TESTING
DURATION SHORT
RISK LEVEL HARMLESS.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    CLASS-DATA:cds_test_environment TYPE REF TO if_cds_test_environment,
               sql_test_environment TYPE REF TO if_osql_test_environment.

    CLASS-METHODS:
      "! Instantiate class under test and setup test double frameworks
      class_setup,

      "! Destroy test environments and test doubles
      class_teardown.

    METHODS:
      "! Reset test doubles
      setup,

      "! Reset transactional buffer
      teardown,

      "! Check input is validate
      check_input_is_validate FOR TESTING,

      "! Check input is invalid
      check_input_is_invalid FOR TESTING,

      "! Check returned features for instance with overall status 'Open'
      check_setstatustoopen      FOR TESTING,

      "! Check returned features for instance with overall status 'Rejected'
      get_features_rejected      FOR TESTING,

      "! Check action result is right
      check_action_result FOR TESTING.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS ltc_ZI_UT_ROOT IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD class_setup.
    cds_test_environment = cl_cds_test_environment=>create( i_for_entity = 'ZI_UT_ROOT' ).
    sql_test_environment = cl_osql_test_environment=>create( i_dependency_list = VALUE #( ( 'I_SUPPLIER_VH' ) ) ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD class_teardown.
    cds_test_environment->destroy( ).
    sql_test_environment->destroy( ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD check_setstatustoopen.
    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
        CREATE FIELDS ( Status )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid   = 'Root'
                        Status = ''  ) )
        MAPPED DATA(mapped)
        FAILED DATA(faild)
        REPORTED DATA(reported).

    READ ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
        ALL FIELDS WITH
        CORRESPONDING #( mapped-zi_ut_root )
        RESULT DATA(root_results).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( msg = 'Status should be O!' exp = 'O' act = root_results[ 1 ]-Status ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_features_rejected.
    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
        CREATE FIELDS ( Status )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid   = 'Root'
                        Status = 'R'  ) )
        MAPPED DATA(mapped)
        FAILED DATA(faild)
        REPORTED DATA(reported).

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
            EXECUTE rejectOrder
            FROM VALUE #( ( %tky = mapped-zi_ut_root[ 1 ]-%tky  ) )
        FAILED DATA(failed_action)
        REPORTED DATA(reported_action).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( act = lines( failed_action-zi_ut_root ) exp = 1 msg = 'Should has error' ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial( act = failed_action-zi_ut_root[ 1 ]-Orderid ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( exp = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                        act = failed_action-zi_ut_root[ 1 ]-%action-rejectOrder
                                        msg = 'rejectOrder action should be disabled').
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD setup.
    cds_test_environment->clear_doubles( ).
    sql_test_environment->clear_doubles( ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD check_action_result.
    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
        CREATE FIELDS ( TotalPrice )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid   = 'Root'
                        TotalPrice = '100'  ) )
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
            EXECUTE deductDiscount
            FROM VALUE #( ( %cid_ref = 'Root'
                            %param-discount_percent = '10' ) )
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
            EXECUTE acceptOrder
            FROM VALUE #( ( %cid_ref = 'Root' ) )
        MAPPED DATA(mapped)
        FAILED DATA(faild)
        REPORTED DATA(reported).

    READ ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
       ENTITY zi_ut_root
       ALL FIELDS WITH
       CORRESPONDING #( mapped-zi_ut_root )
       RESULT DATA(root_results).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( act = lines( root_results ) exp = 1 msg = 'Should has result' ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( act = root_results[ 1 ]-TotalPrice exp = '90' msg = 'Total price should be 90' ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( act = root_results[ 1 ]-Status exp = 'A' msg = 'Status should be A' ).

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD teardown.
    ROLLBACK ENTITIES.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD check_input_is_validate.
    DATA vendor_mock_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF i_supplier_vh.

    vendor_mock_data = VALUE #( ( Supplier = 'test' ) ).
    sql_test_environment->insert_test_data( vendor_mock_data ).

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
        CREATE FIELDS ( Status vendor BeginDate EndDate )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid   = 'Root'
                        Status = ''
                        vendor = 'test'
                        BeginDate = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ) - 10
                        EndDate = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ) + 10 ) )
    MAPPED DATA(mapped)
    FAILED DATA(faild)
    REPORTED DATA(reported).

*    COMMIT ENTITIES IN SIMULATION MODE RESPONSES
    COMMIT ENTITIES RESPONSES
        FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
        REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_initial( act = commit_failed msg = `Should't has error` ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD check_input_is_invalid.
    DATA vendor_mock_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF i_supplier_vh.

    vendor_mock_data = VALUE #( ( Supplier = 'test' ) ).
    sql_test_environment->insert_test_data( vendor_mock_data ).

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_ut_root
        ENTITY zi_ut_root
        CREATE FIELDS ( Status vendor BeginDate EndDate )
        WITH VALUE #( ( %cid   = 'Root'
                        Status = 'X'
                        vendor = 'test_1'
                        BeginDate = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ) + 10
                        EndDate = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ) - 10 ) )
    MAPPED DATA(mapped)
    FAILED DATA(faild)
    REPORTED DATA(reported).

    COMMIT ENTITIES IN SIMULATION MODE RESPONSE OF zi_ut_root
        FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
        REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial( act = commit_reported-zi_ut_root[ %element-status = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ]
                                             msg = 'Status should be marked as error' ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial( act = commit_reported-zi_ut_root[ %element-vendor = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ]
                                             msg = 'Vendor should be marked as error' ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial( act = commit_reported-zi_ut_root[ %element-BeginDate = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ]
                                             msg = 'BeginDate should be marked as error' ).
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_not_initial( act = commit_reported-zi_ut_root[ %element-EndDate = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ]
                                             msg = 'EndDate should be marked as error' ).
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

 BDEF Code：

managed implementation in class zbp_i_ut_root unique;
strict ( 2 );
with draft;

define behavior for zi_ut_root //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zrap_ut_root
draft table zrap_ut_root_df
lock master total etag LastChangedAt
authorization master ( instance )
early numbering
//etag master <field_name>
{
  create;
  update ( features : instance );
  delete ( features : instance );

  draft action ( features : instance ) Edit;
  draft action Activate optimized;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Resume;
  draft determine action Prepare
  {
    validation checkInput;
  }

  determination setStatusToOpen on modify { create; update; }

  validation checkInput on save { create; update; field Status, Vendor, BeginDate, EndDate; }

  action ( features : instance ) deductDiscount parameter zp_ut_root_discount result [1] $self;
  action ( features : instance ) acceptOrder;
  action ( features : instance ) rejectOrder;

  side effects
  {
    action acceptOrder affects $self;
    action rejectOrder affects $self;
  }

  field ( readonly )
  Orderid,
  CreatedBy,
  CreatedAt,
  LocalLastChangedBy,
  LocalLastChangedAt,
  LastChangedAt;

  field ( mandatory )
  Status,
  Vendor,
  BeginDate,
  EndDate;

  association _item { create; with draft; }

  mapping for zrap_ut_root control zrap_ut_root_ct
    {
      Orderid            = orderid;
      Status             = status;
      Vendor             = vendor;
      BeginDate          = begin_date;
      EndDate            = end_date;
      TotalPrice         = total_price;
      CurrencyCode       = currency_code;
      CreatedBy          = created_by;
      CreatedAt          = created_at;
      LocalLastChangedBy = local_last_changed_by;
      LocalLastChangedAt = local_last_changed_at;
      LastChangedAt      = last_changed_at;
    }
}

define behavior for zi_ut_item //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zrap_ut_item
draft table zrap_ut_item_df
lock dependent by _root
authorization dependent by _root
early numbering
//etag master <field_name>
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly )
  Orderid,
  Itemid,
  CreatedBy,
  CreatedAt,
  LocalLastChangedBy,
  LocalLastChangedAt,
  LastChangedAt;

  association _root { with draft; }
  association _subitm { create; with draft; }

  mapping for zrap_ut_item control zrap_ut_item_ct
    {
      Orderid            = orderid;
      Itemid             = itemid;
      Component          = component;
      Quantity           = quantity;
      Unit               = unit;
      CreatedBy          = created_by;
      CreatedAt          = created_at;
      LocalLastChangedBy = local_last_changed_by;
      LocalLastChangedAt = local_last_changed_at;
      LastChangedAt      = last_changed_at;
    }
}

define behavior for zi_ut_subitm //alias <alias_name>
persistent table zrap_ut_subitm
draft table zrap_ut_sub_df
lock dependent by _root
authorization dependent by _root
early numbering
//etag master <field_name>
{
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly )
  Orderid,
  Itemid,
  Subitemid,
  CreatedBy,
  CreatedAt,
  LocalLastChangedBy,
  LocalLastChangedAt,
  LastChangedAt;

  association _root { with draft; }
  association _item { with draft; }

  mapping for zrap_ut_subitm control zrap_ut_subitm_ct
    {
      Orderid            = orderid;
      Itemid             = itemid;
      Subitemid          = subitemid;
      ScheduleDate       = schedule_date;
      Quantity           = quantity;
      Unit               = unit;
      Customer           = customer;
      CreatedBy          = created_by;
      CreatedAt          = created_at;
      LocalLastChangedBy = local_last_changed_by;
      LocalLastChangedAt = local_last_changed_at;
      LastChangedAt      = last_changed_at;
    }
}

Root entity code:

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Interface for Unit test --Root view'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define root view entity zi_ut_root
  as select from zrap_ut_root
  composition [0..*] of zi_ut_item as _item
  association to I_Supplier_VH     as _supp on $projection.Vendor = _supp.Supplier
{
      @EndUserText.label: 'ID'
  key orderid               as Orderid,
      status                as Status,
      vendor                as Vendor,
      _supp.SupplierName    as VendorName,
      begin_date            as BeginDate,
      end_date              as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price           as TotalPrice,
      currency_code         as CurrencyCode,
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      created_by            as CreatedBy,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      created_at            as CreatedAt,
      @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
      local_last_changed_by as LocalLastChangedBy,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
      local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
      last_changed_at       as LastChangedAt,
      //    _association_name // Make association public

      _item,
      _supp
}

When I perform the unit test, this test data will be persistently stored IN the DB. I think this is incorrect unless I use COMMIT ENTITIES IN SIMULATION MODE RESPONSES instead of COMMIT ENTITIES RESPONSES，Can anyone help me solve this doubt? Thank you very much.

entry.title: Split Budget for Merit & Adjustment Global Template
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are implementing Compensation for 33 countries. In some countries they required Budget based on (Merit + Adjustment) and in some countries ( Merit & Adjustment budget needs to split for e.g. Total Budget is 3% and out of that Merit Budget is 2% and adjustment is 1%).

Do I need to create two separate template for the same or within one template it can be accommodated.

Please provide your inputs on the same.

@xavierlegarrec 

Regards,

Satish

My idea was to filter a table on those two dimensions = "#". Then make an "on button click" script in an optimized story to do as explained in original post. As I can, string manipulations is available from there? However not sure if I can change the member combinations?

entry.title: Re: Python code error in dataflow
entry.content:
Hi XaviPolo

Thanks for reply.

I have modified the code as you mentioend,however I'm still getting a syntax error as below.

def transform(data)
specific_name = ['Male']
df = data[data['gender'].isin(specific_name)]
return df

Kind regards

Hari

entry.title: BTP Trial IAS Provisioning Issue
entry.content: “My BTP trial global account ID is 58dc44e9trial in us10. Identity Authentication token URL exists, but the admin UI and SAML metadata both return errors (Uh oh, 404). I'm unable to establish trust to subscribe to SAP Build Work Zone. Please advise.”

entry.title: CPQ 2.0 - OnItemCopied event (global script)
entry.content:
In “Before add to quote” event of my configurable product I create a unique id ("PA_UniqueId) an put it in an attribute (if attribute is empty). In a global script on the event "BeforeItemAdded" , I read that attribute and add it to a Quote Item Custom field (UCF_UniqueId)

Now when I copy that Item on the Cart, this attribute and user custom field are copied along. What I want to do is to fill them with a new unique id (because otherwise it is not unique anymore)

This I try to do in a global script with event "OnItemCopied". There I get the product from the "context.CopiedItems" and fill the attribute with a new unique id. I do the same for the user custom field of the copiedItem. The Orginal Items I leave as it is.

My question now is, how can this be saved ? Because the values are not stored (although if I debug them at the end of the script, the new values are visible in the attribute / user custom field)

Next info was found in the HELP

User copies item in quote
          Execute item action : Copy
                Performing calculations on copied item
                Build number of items for product types
                Copying product configuration
                Copying item attachments
          Saving copied items
  After copying products in quote event trigered
 context:  CopiedItems : IEnumerable<IQuoteItem>
                 OriginalItems : IEnumerable<IQuoteItem>
                 Quote : Instance of type: Quote2
                Get item column values
  Before quote rendering event trigered
context -> Quote : Instance of type: Quote2

As far as I can see the product / quote item is not saved anymore. So what is the use of the "After copying products in quote event" to be triggered ? Some more info on how this works, and what the use is would be nice. 

Who can tell me what I'm doing wrong  and how I can solve my problem ?

entry.title: Re: CJ42 S4 HANA Fiori Apps
entry.content: Thanks. This helps a lot.

entry.title: Re: Send Different Activation Emails to Newly Created Users Based on Their Account Attributes
entry.content:
Hi everyone

Do you know if we can include the user id from lms (login name in ias) into the ias mail text?

KR
Olga

entry.title: Re: SBM closing bill process is taking more than expected
entry.content:
Hello Alberto,

the closing of the bill is an asynchronous process. Usually you'll receive a 200 for single bills closing or a 202 for batches of bills immediately.
The time until the bill finally gets closed isn't predictable. It depends on
- total number of bills to be closed (triggered either manually or automatically)
- availability of dependent micro services used for validations
- overall resource situation

If you depend on the final closing state you could check the bill status using GET /bills/identifier with an dynamic interval, e.g. first check status after 1 sec, then second check after 10 sec, then third check after 30 sec and so on.

I hope this information helps you.

Kind regards
Ralf

entry.title: Re: Notification for work order Clean Up
entry.content:
Hi M, Thank you for answering.

but what if the user did not tick that - does that mean notifications will not be closed while the work order remains in closed status?

I think there is a pile of notifications that are still open so I am looking for something where we can do a clean up to auto close notifications with closed work orders... like is there a background job for this?

entry.title: Re: ATC - How to Implement AUTHORITY-CHECK
entry.content:
Hi,
there is a check for missing AUTHORITY CHECK statements in certain contexts as part of the Code Vulnerability Analyzer (CVA) checks. See this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/code-vulnerability-analyzer-checks/ba-p/13339467

Is this what you we're looking for?

Regards,
Laura

entry.content: Yes, the "local-entry-point" plan is now available in our Pay-As-You-Go account.

entry.title: How to Generate a Dynamic URL for Approval Task in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm working on a workflow using SAP Build Process Automation and need help with generating a dynamic task approval link that can be sent via email notification to the approver.

Objective:

  • Generate a dynamic URL for each task instance.

  • Send the URL via email template or script task.

  • Clicking the link should open the approval task directly in My Inbox or SAP Build Work Zone / Launchpad.

Thanks in advance,
Parshuram

entry.title: Re: Automatic Absence Creation for Late coming/Early leaving in SuccessFactors Time Tracking
entry.content:
Hi @sharmama,

I am facing the same error 

"The result for time type group SG_CLT_DWT / (not valuated) is not calculated based on any time valuation assigned to your time recording profile. However, this group is used as input group, threshold group, comparison group or deduction group by a time valuation in your profile. Please have an administrator review your time recording profile and assign another time valuation that calculates time type group SG_CLT_DWT / (not valuated)."

Were you able to solve this?

entry.title: User does not have sufficient privileges in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi

I have created a process automation like a bellow example 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-academy-salesorder.html

here it is working fine, and workflow is triggering while creating the instance from Process and Workflow>> Start New instance and Close. 

But when i created the Build App for the API like bellow:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html

But here it is giving error at the time for workflow instance 

"responseText": "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"bpm.workflowruntime.rest.user.not.sufficient.privileges\",\"message\":\"User does not have sufficient privileges.\"}}"

I have assign the role also, But still giving error. Can any one help me please....

entry.title: Re: Impact convertion ECC to S/4HANA in SAP WM

entry.title: Re: Python code error in dataflow
entry.content:
probably there is a typo related with tabs

def transform(data):
    specific_name = ['Male']
    df = data[data['gender'].isin(specific_name)]
    return df

entry.title: Re: Work zone differences and widgets
entry.content: The primary difference between SAP Build Work Zone and SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone lies in their focus and integration capabilities: SAP Build Work Zone is a part of SAP's Business Technology Platform, designed to provide a holistic interface for enterprise applications, offering customizable dashboards, integration with various SAP and non-SAP systems, and a more technical platform-centric approach. SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone, on the other hand, is specifically tailored for HR-related applications and processes, integrated deeply with SAP SuccessFactors HR solutions, focusing on enhancing employee experience, communication, and engagement within HR contexts.

entry.title: Re: Work zone differences and widgets
entry.content: See more info here: https://www.sap.com/products/hcm/workzone-hr.html https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/workzone.html

entry.title: Re: Python code error in dataflow
entry.content: Hi XaviPolo, The same code works in python notebooks or google colabs , but not in Datashpere . I hope that those "isin" functions not available yet in Datasphere.I can't write "import pandas " in datasphere.

entry.title: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R Invoice form in SAP Business One 10.0
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am unable to find the checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R Invoice form (in Item row in Contents tab) while choosing Transaction Type as GST Debit Memo in SAP Business One 10.0. Could someone suggest how to make it appear in Item row?

entry.title: FEC - How to reverse 2 postings with BKPF-BSTAT="O" (from RFOPENPOSTING_FR) ?
entry.content:
Hello,

we have an issue to run RFOPENPOSTING_FR in a company, as it has already been executed, generating 2 postings (with BKPF-BSTAT=O).

in order to run it again correctly, we would have first to reverse these 2 postings.

but it's not possible with FBRA.

how could it be possible to reverse them ?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Distribute amount to payment date based on invoice da...
entry.content:
Hi @Astra1562 

Please refer to the script below. 

MEMBERSET [d/Company_Code] = "A"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "2025-01-01" TO "2025-01-31"
MEMBERSET [d/Region]="EMEA"

INTEGER @Counter
INTEGER @PaymentDays

@PaymentDays = %Payment_Days%-1

FOR @Counter = 0 to @PaymentDays
	DATA([d/Measures]="InvoiceAmount",[d/PaymentDate]=NEXT(@Counter,"DAY",%Start_Payment%)) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="InvoiceAmount",[d/PaymentDate]="")
ENDFOR

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

 

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC Data Action/Scripting - create new member and...
entry.content: Hi Nikhil, thank you very much for your reply! It helps me to have clear steps and hints to finish the task. Thanks again!

entry.title: How to Remove "One Time Deduction" from Action menu on People Profile - Employee Centra
entry.content: Manager can able to see employee's "One Time deduction" even after removing the permission: Logged in as Manager -> Under Manage My Team --> User Profile --> Actions --> Still can able to see One Time Deduction.

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Work Distribution Category for Approval Process Definition
entry.content:
This is a few years after the initial comment but I thought I should add that I have tried this enhancement out for approval for expense report to change the approver based on an extension field value.

In the end the assignment to the UUID only worked when passing the Business Partner UUID for the approver in the following section

entry.title: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2505
entry.content:
Welcome to the 2505 release of SAP Asset Performance Management (APM). There are lots of new ways to make working with industrial systems smoother and smarter. We’ve got three new public APIs to help you fully manage system data, a handy app for creating and reusing industrial system templates, better ways to view your asset hierarchies, and new status controls for assessments and recommendations. Add to that some cool updates for IoT-connected devices, visual inspections, and admin tools - here’s what’s new, organized by business capability.

 

Asset Data and Information Management

Public APIs for Industrial Systems 

Three new APIs are now available on the SAP Business Acceleration Hub:

  • Manage Reference Designator Libraries
  • Manage Industrial System Hierarchy
  • Manage Industrial System Configuration

These APIs enable full CRUD operations for key industrial system components, allowing customers to customize configurations, add new fields, and automate workflows. This boosts flexibility, speeds up system management, and supports seamless integration—delivering greater efficiency and control.

API Reference interface for managing Reference Designator Libraries

 

Industrial System Templates 

You can now create industrial systems from existing templates, streamlining setup and configuration. The new Manage Industrial System Templates app makes it easy to organize and reuse templates.

Enhanced Industrial System Views

 Industrial systems can now be viewed in both graph and table formats, giving you more flexibility in how you visualize and manage your asset hierarchies.

Watch this space for a dedicated blog on the industrial system enhancements, coming soon.

 

Asset Reliability Engineering

Role-Based Assessment Release

 Only users with the appropriate “Publish” roles can now release RCM, FMEA, and Strategy Assessments, ensuring better control and governance. For more information, see 3567652 - SAP Asset Performance Management: Manage Strategy Assessment for Classes Authorization with 2505 release - SAP for Me

 

Lifecycle Management for Recommendations and Assessments

  • You can mark recommendations and strategy assessments as “Obsolete” to keep your data clean and up-to-date. Comments are required to provide context for these changes.
  • Authorized users can now reset released strategy assessments to “In Process” for further modifications, supporting continuous improvement.

 

Asset Health Monitoring

Device Connectivity Capabilities (Embedded_IoT) 

APM now supports device management, available through the SAP Early Adopter Care (EAC) Program. This enables seamless integration and monitoring of IoT-connected assets. The EAC phase starts with a basic version that will gradually be enhanced. To obtain access to this feature, see Getting Early Adopter Access to New Features and Functions. 

For more information, see this blog SAP Asset Performance Management Embedded IoT: Device Management is available via EAC.

Detailed Long Text in Alerts (Embedded_IoT) 

Alerts generated by rules now display detailed descriptions in the Long Text field, providing clearer context for both alerts and notifications.

 

Enhanced Visual Inspection Results (Embedded_IoT)

 View images in full screen with linked measurements and easy navigation. Confirm or reject AI-generated indicators individually or in bulk for streamlined workflows.

 

Aggregation Rules for Technical Objects (Embedded_IoT) 

Create aggregation rules to consolidate data from child technical objects into their parent objects. This helps summarize key indicators across assets, enabling quicker insights, easier monitoring, and better decision-making throughout your asset hierarchy.

 

Administration and Configuration

Data Synchronization Tab 

The Integration Monitor app now features a left-side menu with a Data Synchronization tab, providing a clearer view of sync status and data metrics. This update sets the stage for more tabs and features soon. 

  • Data Synchronization - for the backend integration
  • The new UI File Upload Status list provides clear visibility into the processing state of files within the eIoT Data Integration channel, enhancing transparency for the file upload feature introduced last year.

 

 

 

Cross Product Capabilities

SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) Model Transition

As part of our effort to standardize the technology stack for SAP Asset Performance Management, we are currently in the process of transitioning our existing applications to the SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model in a phased approach with different timelines per application. 

This transition includes the migration of the database from using GUIDs (32 characters) to UUIDs (36 characters). You can find more details in the SAP Note 3603407.

Improved Status Filtering for Technical Objects

 The Select Technical Objects popup now automatically excludes inactive, deleted, or marked-for-deletion objects, ensuring you work only with relevant, active assets.

 

Get Started

For an exhaustive list of all new features, visit the SAP Help Portal - What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management.

Submit or vote for the improvement you would like to see in the SAP Continuous Influence session.

See you in the next release!

entry.title: MRP2 Procurement Type Authorization Objects
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

What is the Authorization object in Procurement Type in MRP2 (field name: BESKZ)?

entry.title: Freight charge amount recorded as negative in the returned purchase order. in SAP MM
entry.content:
We are creating return PO w.r.t to Normal PO and in Normal PO we have mentioned the Basic & Freight amount, all charges are getting Plus or consolidated into Net Price.

But in case of Return PO we have mentioning the pricing elements/condition types, and for freight charge is recording negative instead of getting Plus as Normal PO.

Based on analysis we found that, in Return PO freight amount automatically get convert into negative and thus it not matches with as Actual PO amount.

To correct this, we have to create one more condition type & assign it into Pricing procedure and make it manually, and while create return Freight condition type mention/assign the Plus/Minus field as -ve (Negative).

Then in Return PO it will add the freight amount in basic amount and convert into same as Net amount of Normal PO.

entry.title: Re: Unable to view tile on SAP Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Ramesh,

When functionality works on the S/4HANA Fiori Launchpad but doesn't appear in Workzone, the issue could typically be related to configuration or integration settings between the two platforms. Here are a few points from my side:

Check Semantic Object Configuration: Ensure that the custom Semantic Object is correctly configured and mapped in both S/4HANA and Workzone.

Integration Settings: Ensure that the integration settings between S/4HANA and Workzone are correct. This includes validating any destinations or connections that are established for the flow of data and services between the two platforms. Within Workzone, ensure that configurations align with those set in S/4HANA. This means checking the role assignments, permissions, and access settings for the tile.

Here is a step-by-step guide which might be help for your case Exposing On-Premise S/4 Apps to SAP Build Work Zon... - SAP Community.

Thanks & Best Regards,

Amber

entry.title: Re: Global Running Day with SAP Community
entry.content: Thanks for organizing this exciting initiative, Katherine! I’m happy to share that I’ll be participating in Global Running Day from Chennai, India. Looking forward to seeing photos and updates from across the globe!

entry.title: how to make an Optional inspection characteristic Required after a certain number of inspection lots
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement that a given Master inspection characteristic in my Inspection plan , which is marked as optional, should become required, after a given number of inspection lots.

Is there parameter in the control indicators of the Master inspection characteristic or any field in inspection plan to make this happen?

e.g.:- An MIC A1 is optional but part of the inspection plan for a material. For first 10 inspection lots , the MIC is part of the inspection lot created but they do not record results for it, as it is optional. However, when the 11th Inspection lot is created, the MIC becomes required, so that they cannot complete the UD without recording results for it.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Getting "Feature Disabled" status after the upgrade t...
entry.content:
I’ve experienced a similar issue, and here’s what worked for me:

You can solve it by clicking the “UPGRADE NOW” button (you’ll find it in the same spot as in your screenshot: Admin Center > Upgrade Center > Completed Upgrades).

After that, just wait—it can take up to 24 hours for the feature to be fully upgraded. This waiting period is also mentioned in the related KBA. : 3319564 - SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub (TIH) Customer Checklist - SAP for Me

Hope it helps. And after that, remember to set up the suitable permissions in Manage Permission Roles so that you can see the TIH and Growth Portfolio. Good luck!

entry.title: Re: Access to Purchased SAP Learning Hub to do stay curre...
entry.content: Hello, I've similar issue on my side. I have received the confirmation of learning hub purchase howver there is no information abour activation code. I've opened a case but no answer. Case number is 5000166330

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone Performance
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

While waiting for feedback from the SAP support team, here are some tips you might try to improve page loading times or narrow down the causing issue:

Content Optimization: Review the content being loaded on the homepage, particularly large files and complex scripts. Try reducing the amount of data being loaded initially and the number of calls made to third-party integrations.

Network Load Analysis: Use developer tools or network analysis tools to check for any specific network requests causing delays in loading. Troubleshoot problematic requests and optimize network traffic.

Optimize Images and Multimedia: Make sure all images and multimedia files are compressed or optimized to reduce loading times.

Limit Component Use: Reduce the number of dynamic components on the page or try asynchronous loading for non-critical content.

Thanks & Best Regards,

Amber

entry.title: Mapping Header Text for OrderRequest
entry.content:
We have a requirement to map a large amount of text for PO Terms and Conditions to the header of the PO.  We are sending the order from S/4 as idoc.

I have tried to add the text as a constant value, however i get an error message, as attached.

We also thought about adding the text to the segment E1ARBCIG_HDREXTN, however would require many segments to hold all the text and then we are limited to only concatenating 3 when in CIG.

Can anyone else advise how they have included long amounts of text into their SBN PO originating from SAP S/4 or ECC?

entry.title: Possibility to register different branches within one business partner - S/4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a possibility to register different branches within one business partner?

We have suppliers with several locations with different addresses. Legally, however, they operate under the same company name and tax number. In order to keep our supplier base lean, we would prefer to create these several addresses under just one business partner number and select which address is to be used in the respective purchase order document. Is this possible in S/4HANA public cloud?

We know of the SSCUI 106258 Enable Partner Functions in Manage Purchase Orders Application. However, the Partner Function also requires several business partner numbers, which we would like to avoid.

Thanks in advance for any input.

Best regards,

Kerisha

Margit

entry.title: ItemID with automatic generation vs. item connector
entry.content:
Hi,

Assume that the SuccessFactors Learning module uses automatic numbering for items. In automatic numbering, a prefix is used, so for example, the system-generated itemID would be X1001.

If the item connector is later implemented, can the item connector import any ID information in the CPNT_ID field, as long as it is not the same as the IDs already found in the system? For example, the item ID imported by the connector could be Y1001 or 1001?

I assume that the automatic generation of item IDs does not prevent the later implementation of the item connector?

I just found this info from the SAP help (https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-learning/importing-courses-with-learning-item-connector/course-item-data-connector-file-columns?q=CPNT_ID). 

Thanks in advance, if you could help me!

with regards,

riitta

entry.title: Re: MRP2 Procurement Type Authorization Objects
entry.content:
Hi,

 

not familiar with the MM module but there is an authorization object in the same ABAP package: 

M_MTDI_ORG

 

Besides that, I found these objects used in the same package:

M_PLAF_ORG 

M_FCDM_ORG 

M_IS_DISPO 

 

 

Have you tried this authorization object?

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Issue in Refurbishment Process with EWM while Goods Issue for Damage material
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing the refurbishment process using SAP EWM and have encountered an issue related to delivery types during Goods Issue.

Process Overview:

  • Split valuation is activated for the material.

  • A Purchase Order was created for the NEW valuation type material, and the stock has been successfully uploaded.

  • The NEW valuation type material was issued to production.

  • During the production process, the material got damaged, and we now need to issue the DAMAGED valuation type material back to the warehouse/store.

  • A maintenance plan order was created using IW31.

Issue Faced:

When attempting to perform a Goods Issue for the order, the system displays the following error

"Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document"

Request for Support:

Could you please advise:

  • If there is any mistake in the process mentioned above?

  • What is the correct way to issue damaged material from production to warehouse/store under the DAMAGED valuation type?

  • Are there any specific configurations (e.g., movement type to delivery type mapping, valuation type handling in EWM) that need to be checked or updated to resolve this issue?

 

Thanks You

entry.title: Requirement for User Exit/BAdI to Prevent Diesel Reservations for Surplus Equipment in IW31/IW32
entry.content:
Description:
We need to implement a control mechanism during maintenance order creation/change (transactions IW31/IW32) to prevent diesel (material) reservations for surplus equipment. Specifically, we are looking for a suitable User Exit or BAdI that can intercept the save logic, validate the equipment status, and check the material component data before the reservation is created.

Please advise on the appropriate enhancement point where we can perform this validation, ideally before the reservation is committed to the database.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors People Analytics (Stories): How to create change report (current vs previous valu
entry.content: Really helpful thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to Generate a Dynamic URL for Approval Task in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Parshuram,

 

You can get all the task instance id or filtered the tasks you need by this api https://api.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/overview . 

And the regular inbox form task link's structure is: 

[your host]+
"#WorkflowTask-DisplayMyInbox?sap-ui-app-id-hint=saas_approuter_com.sap.spa.inbox&/detail/NA/" + [your task instance id] + "/TaskCollection(SAP__Origin='NA',InstanceID='"+[your task instance id]+"')";
 
You can splice a complete url in script, then send it as a custom variable in email to users.
 
Aqua Wei

entry.title: How to add task to an existing transport request using program
entry.content:
PARAMETERS: p_TR TYPE trkorr OBLIGATORY. // Take TR as parameter

 

DATA: lt_authorlist TYPE trwbo_users,

lt_return TYPE e070-trkorr,

ls_return TYPE bapiret2,

lv_new_task TYPE trkorr. // Variable to take task

 

START-OF-SELECTION.

 

 

CALL FUNCTION 'TRINT_INSERT_NEW_COMM'

EXPORTING

wi_kurztext = 'New Task' // Description if creating TR

wi_trfunction = 'S' // 'S' to create task under TR

iv_username = sy-uname // System Username

wi_strkorr = p_TR // Export TR value to FM

IMPORTING

we_trkorr = lv_new_task // Import task to the variable

EXCEPTIONS

no_systemname = 1

no_systemtype = 2

no_authorization = 3

db_access_error = 4

file_access_error = 5

enqueue_error = 6

number_range_full = 7

invalid_input = 8

OTHERS = 9.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

WRITE: / ' New task created under TR:', p_TR,

/ ' Task number:', lv_new_task.

ELSE.

WRITE: / 'Failed to create task. '.

ENDIF.

*********************************************************************************
Type of request/task
Domain : TRFUNCTION
K : Workbench Request
W : Customizing Request
S : Development/Correction
Q : Customizing Task

entry.title: Re: Stock Transfer Order from 1 to Multiple Plants
entry.content:
Hi Sam, 

There could be various reasons for this:

1) Check if you have the appropriate permissions for the other plants as well.

2) It may still be the case that the storage location or availability dates are not released for the transfer in the material master on the plant view.

3) It could be that the plant is recorded in the system as "inactive" for certain movement types.

4) The supplier or business partner relationship (if relevant) could exclude the plant as a target. You could check again if there are any restrictions.

5) Check if the storage location from which the transfer is to be initiated is correctly assigned and released for the relevant plants.

 

Best regards 

Dennis

entry.title: Using SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 KPI Tiles
entry.content:
One of the new features of Web Intelligence in SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 is the ability to pin a KPI tile from a report onto the BI Launch Pad. This new feature allows users to see KPIs at a glance with more detailed information in the report just a single click away.

In Reading Mode, any block can be pinned simply by hovering over the tile and clicking on the Pin button. In Design Mode, simply right click and choose Pin To Home from the menu. Here I am pinning the Indicator Tile.

Tiles on the BI Launch Pad can have a predefined size of 1x1, 1x2, 2x2 or custom.

 

I positioned the Indicator Title (which is 200x200 pixels by default) on a 2x2 tile and you can see that it has plenty of white space.

Web Intelligence tile pinned to BI Launch Pad

 I could not find a reference to which chart sizes worked with the tile presets, so I used one of the new SAP UI5 widgets for Rich Text.

My tiles

 When designing KPI, the following sizes will work without introducing scrollbars.

  • 1x1 tile (170x110 px)
  • 1x2 tile (330x110 px)
  • 2x2 tile (330x290 px)

In addition to tile size, the tile properties allow a user to customize the widget's OpenDocument URL.

 Another new feature in BI 2025 is the ability to use a chart as a tooltip. Not only is this effective in a Web Intelligence document, but these can also be pinned to the BI Launch Pad. In my example, I've created a Column Chart showing sales revenue by US state. I used the new UI5 chart, but the tooltip feature works with classic charts, too. 

Column chart pinned to BI Launch Pad

 Hovering or clicking on a particular state triggers the tooltip chart. In my example, the tooltip chart is a UI5 bar chart showing quantity by store. As you can see, a larger custom size will be required for these types of charts.

 By default, users can pin up to 5 charts on their BI Launch Pad.

This limit can be increased up to 10 by the BI administrator using the Central Management Console (CMC). Go to Applications -> BI Launch Pad.

  Notice that the pinning feature can be globally disabled or the maximum number of tiles changed.

My Tiles on the BI Launch Pad is just one of many productivity enhancements SAP has made to BI 2025 and Web Intelligence.

Up to 5 tiles, both classic or UI5, can be displayed on BI Launch PadWhat's your favorite new feature in BI 2025? Share your thoughts in the comments.

entry.title: Re: Sec 603 automatically move catch-up contributions to...
entry.content:
Hi, I have been working with SAP on about a solution for the automatic roll-over and Gisele from SAP says that according to the local product manager they are going to provide a solution, and an update should be posted on site below. I reached out this morning to Gisele asking when that update would be posted. 

 

Updated 05/28/2025 at 11:21 by SAP Agent
 
Info for Customer

Hello Joe,

I received confirmation from the Local Product Manager that a functionality to address this scenario will be delivered.
Currently I do not have additional information such as when will this functionality be delivered and how it will work.
However, more details will be provided in the Regulatory Change Manager by the end of the week.

Best Regards,
Gisele 

In the mean time I have written custom payroll rules to do this (still in testing phase).

entry.title: Re: abap2UI5 - (4) Advanced Functionality & Demonstrations
entry.content:
Super job, it is absolutely impressive what is possible with abap2ui5.

I have a question about the charts. Most of the demo apps run on my system.

But not this one. I get the error “openui5 SDK is loaded, module: 'sap/suite/ui/microchart/InteractiveDonutChart.js' is not availabe in openui5”

How can I solve this?

entry.title: Re: Expose the custom field in SAP C4C V2
entry.content:
Hi there: 

You can follow this steps to get the all end to end process.

1. Access Extensibility Administration: Navigate to Settings → Extensibility Administration.

2. Select the Appropriate Business Object: Choose for example a Sales Quote Item to ensure you're working at the item level.

3. Add a Custom Field: Click on Add Field, define the field's properties (name, type, label), and ensure it's relevant to your business needs.

4. Enable OData Service Usage: In the Field Usage section, explicitly check the box for OData Services to make the field available via OData.

5. Publish the Custom Field: After configuring the field, click Publish to deploy it. This action makes the field available in the system and accessible through OData services.

6. Verify the Field in OData Metadata: Access the OData service metadata endpoint (typically /sap/c4c/api/v1/sales-quote/$metadata) to confirm the custom field's presence under the SalesQuoteItem entity.

7. Consume the Field in External Systems: Utilize the OData service to read the custom field's data from external systems like S/4HANA, ensuring proper authentication and data handling mechanisms are in place.

 

Enjoy, 

 

D.

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit (LTMC) for Pricing condition (sales)
entry.content: Please use SAP Migration object allowed Condition types only

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public, Inventory Valuation 4.5. Determine Lowest Value - Range of Coverage
entry.content:
Hello,
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
I am testing  test script: BEJ Inventory Valuation 4.5. Determine Lowest Value - Range of Coverage

and I get this error message when I try to run it: Valuation Alternative ROC contains no value in period 004 2025. First picture.
(There are materials in the system)


If we do not set valuation alternative and leave it blank, we can run the valuation, but the table is empty. Second picture.
In the test script there are no preliminary steps for this scope item.
How can we fix it?
Best regards,

entry.title: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2025 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇵🇪 🇲🇽 🇨🇴 (July 25th - Aug 12th 2024)
entry.content:
¡Hola SAP Developers!

I've got some exciting news to share with you. The SAP CodeJam roadshow is coming back to Latin America! This time, @josh_bentley, @RichHeilman, @thomas_jung, and @ajmaradiaga  will hit the road for the second SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Latin America.  We will have four stops on the roadshow starting the 25th of July 🇧🇷 and then continuing from August 4th - 12th, 2025 🇵🇪 🇲🇽 🇨🇴, doing a total of seven CodeJams, one in São Paulo and then two in Lima, Mexico City and Bogota. Also, we'll organise a couple of quedadas (meetups) as we did last year. :-).

SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

In this CodeJam, you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

SAP CodeJam events and quedadas (meetups) part of the roadshow (Register Now!)

Below is a listing of the SAP CodeJam events and quedadas (meetups) on the roadshow schedule:

Dates

CodeJam topic

Location

Registration

Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core

Link

Make sure to register to secure your place. It is likely that the places available will go fast.

What if the CodeJam topics do not cover the SAP technology that you focus on? We've organised additional local meetups just to get together and have a chat. See you all somewhere in Latin America on the roadshow!

entry.title: Re: Build Process Automation notification email with URL...
entry.content:
Hi Kuroken,

I gave some advise in this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-generate-a-dynamic-url-for-approval-task-in-sap-business-process/qaq-p/14116609

Maybe you can follow the business accelerator hub doc to find info about the task's status. Hope it's helpful.

 

Aqua Wei

entry.title: How to maintain copy control from preliminary billing document to billing document
entry.content: I have condition types entered manually in sales order creation. After creating a preliminary billing document from sales order, it goes through approval workflow. Once PBD is approved, I have a scheduled job for creation of billing documents from preliminary billing documents. Upon checking of billing document, the conditions I have maintained in sales order are removed. Is there a way to maintain copy control or pricing type for billing document creation from preliminary billing documents?

entry.title: Re: Conditions Cannot be Created in Distribution
entry.content: @shweta_kumari

entry.title: Re: Conditions Cannot be Created in Distribution
entry.content: @shweta_kumari Have you got solution for this issue?

entry.title: Re: Certificate C_S4CPB_2502
entry.content: Hello, I opened a case on 22nd Mai, which is currently assigned to a third party service provider for resolution. BR

entry.title: Re: Conditions Cannot be Created in Distribution
entry.content: @shweta_kumari Have you got solution for this issue? I have the same problem as described in your ticket. What is a solution here?

entry.title: Re: FEC - How to reverse 2 postings with BKPF-BSTAT="O" (...
entry.content: FBRA is used for reverse clearing. Have you tried F.80?

entry.title: Cause Code Filtering Not Working Based on Damage Code in Notification
entry.content:
Issue Description:
In the PM Notification screen, when entering a malfunction:

  • If a specific Object Part and Damage Code (e.g., Engine → Blow By) is selected,

  • The Cause Code catalog should filter only causes related to that Damage (i.e., TIP-BLOW related causes).

However, the system currently displays all cause groups (e.g., TIP-BLOW, TIP-EXBS, TIP-OVER, etc.), regardless of the selected damage. This leads to incorrect cause selection and data inconsistency in breakdown analysis.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Go to notification creation screen (IW21/IW22).

  2. Select:

    • Object Part: TIPPER-1 – Engine

    • Damage: TIP-ENG → Blow By

  3. Open Cause selection.

  4. Observe all causes are visible, not filtered to just TIP-BLOW.

Expected Behavior:
Only causes from the selected Damage Group should be displayed — in this case, only TIP-BLOW.

Screenshot: (Attach the image you provided)

In standard SAP, filtering Cause Codes based on the selected Damage Code is possible or not.

entry.title: Re: Expose the custom field in SAP C4C V2
entry.content:
Dear Delateja,

Thank you very much for your quick and detailed response.

I would appreciate your help with the following queries:

  1. Enabling OData Service Usage --> As per your suggestion in the step 4th, I intended to enable the field for the "OData Service" usage. However, I am unable to find an option to enable this. I’ve attached a screenshot for your reference — kindly let me know if I am missing something.
  2. Identifying the OData Service Name --> You were able to identify the service name for the Sales Quote as sales-quote. Could you please guide me on how to find the service names for other objects as well (specifically for OData V2)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Looking forward to your response. Thank you once again for your support!                                                                                                                                                                                                              Best regards, Prathiva

entry.title: Re: BI Launchpad Log out - Leave Site message
entry.content:
Hi jemstar,

 

Seems like this feature has been lost since the beginning of 4.3. Happily, it's back since 4.3 SP4 Patch8!

You'll find the info on this note : https://me.sap.com/notes/3582439/E 

 

Regards, 

Ben
